---
title: "Streamflow"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---
#Install Packages
```{r}
#| label: load-packages and data

library(here)
library(tidyverse)
library(patchwork)

p301 <- read.csv(here("Week1", "data", "p301.csv"))
p301_yearly <- p301 |>
  group_by(wy) |>
  summarise(total_streamflow = sum(streamflow),
            total_precip = sum(precip),
            percent_streamflow = (total_streamflow / total_precip) * 100)

# calculate mean, range, and sd of percent streamflow
mean(p301_yearly$percent_streamflow)
```

```{r}
sd(p301_yearly$percent_streamflow)
```
